title: Trial
description: One `Sample × Solver` pairing within a Run. Trials carry their own status, cost and token accounting, an array of SolverOutputs (Agents may produce multiple), and an array of ScoreRecords (one per applicable Scorer/Judge).

sample_ref.description: Reference to the Sample being evaluated.

solver_ref.description: Reference to the Solver or Agent that produced output.

finished_at.description: Set when the Trial reaches a terminal status.

status.description: Trial lifecycle status. Mirrors Run states plus `timeout` and `skipped` distinct from generic `failed` to support per-status reporters.

outputs.description: One or more SolverOutput records. Pure Solvers emit exactly one; Agents may emit one per step plus a final.

items.description: A single Solver/Agent output record. Open object — concrete shape depends on Solver kind.

scores.description: ScoreRecords produced by each Scorer/Judge attached to the Eval. Each entry carries the scorer/judge ID, the value, and per-score metadata (confidence interval, rationale).

scorer_ref.description: Reference to the Scorer or Judge that produced this score.

value.description: Score value. Open shape: a boolean (pass/fail), number (continuous), string (categorical label), or structured verdict object (judge output).

cost.description: Total cost attributed to this Trial (model + sandbox + judge). Currency MUST match the Run's currency.

tokens.description: Aggregate token usage across all model calls in this Trial.

provider_fingerprint.description: Provider-reported response fingerprint (model version + system fingerprint). Required for cross-provider replay matching (research/11 §11).

trace_uri.description: Pointer into the per-Trial OTLP trace file (e.g. `file://traces/<trial_id>.otlp.gz`).

seed.description: Per-Trial deterministic seed (hex-encoded 32-byte blake3 of `run_id || sample_id || solver_id || attempt`).

error.description: Populated when status is `failed`/`timeout`/`budget-exceeded`. Open object — concrete shape is harness-defined (kind, message, stack, retry_count).
